title: Department Top Three Salaries
input_format: Table: Employee with columns id (int), name (varchar), salary (int), departmentId (int). Table: Department with columns id (int), name (varchar).
output_format: Result table with columns Department, Employee, Salary showing employees who earn one of the top three unique salaries in their department
example_input:
Table: Employee
| id | name  | salary | departmentId |
| 1  | Joe   | 85000  | 1            |
| 2  | Henry | 80000  | 2            |
| 3  | Sam   | 60000  | 2            |
| 4  | Max   | 90000  | 1            |
| 5  | Janet | 69000  | 1            |
| 6  | Randy | 85000  | 1            |
| 7  | Will  | 70000  | 1            |
example_output:
| Department | Employee | Salary |
| IT         | Max      | 90000  |
| IT         | Joe      | 85000  |
| IT         | Randy    | 85000  |
| IT         | Will     | 70000  |
| Sales      | Henry    | 80000  |
| Sales      | Sam      | 60000  |
